summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Andre Dev agency website - both backend APIs and frontend functionality are working correctly

design_issues.issue: Minor accessibility warning for Dialog component missing description

passed_tests: Backend: All 11 API endpoints working (auth/register, auth/login, auth/me, contact, projects CRUD, messages CRUD, stats, portfolio)
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly with all sections (Hero, Services, Portfolio, Testimonials, Contact)
Frontend: User registration flow complete and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: User login flow working correctly
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats cards and navigation
Frontend: Projects page - create new project works
Frontend: Messages page - send message works
Frontend: Settings page loads user information
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor Dialog accessibility warning)
